title: bothriochloa wrightii
intro: Bothriochloa wrightii, also known as Wright's bluestem, is a perennial grass species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bothriochloa wrightii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments and skin conditions.
